title: Ethiopian Azifa Cake with Rich Jam Glaze
description: A moist and flavorful cake inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, topped with a rich jam glaze.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease two 8-inch round cake pans.
Whisk together flour, sugar, and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together Azifa, softened butter, and eggs.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Once the cakes are completely cool, place one layer on a serving plate and spread with jam.
Top with the second cake layer and drizzle with rich jam glaze.
